perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a studio with a man in a blue color-blocked shirt and jeans running around a long wooden table while holding a large plastic bag. (2) The scene transitions to a bright kitchen where a woman in black is hand-washing dishes; the man enters the frame and talks to her with animated gestures. (3) A white countertop dishwasher from the brand DIKE is introduced and shown in close-up. (4) The man demonstrates the product, showing the interior racks filled with bowls and fruit, and pointing to the control panel. (5) Additional appliances, a food waste disposer and a pressure cooker, are presented on the kitchen counter. (6) The man and woman stand behind the three appliances, gesturing excitedly and holding small storage containers towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music begins immediately. A male voice speaks loudly and rapidly with an excited, humorous tone. (2) Sounds of a plastic bag rustling are audible over the music. (3) A female voice enters the conversation, sounding explanatory and slightly tired compared to the male's high energy. (4) The audio shifts to a more formal but still energetic sales pitch style as the male narrator describes product features. (5) Sharp sound effects like 'dings' and digital 'swooshes' accompany the appearance of text and product highlights. (6) The music remains consistent and energetic until the end, with both voices harmonizing for a final call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '欸 歐巴桑 請問一下' (Hey auntie, may I ask) - Humorous hook. (2) '全部碗都我洗的' (I washed all the bowls) - Character dialogue. (3) 'DIKE 全自動臭氧烘乾洗碗機' (DIKE Automatic Ozone Drying Dishwasher) - Product title. (4) '360度全方位脈衝清洗' (360-degree all-round pulse cleaning) - Functional feature description. (5) '省時省力啦' (Save time and effort) - Benefit-oriented hook. (6) '專屬母親節活動' (Exclusive Mother's Day event) - Promotional theme.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Skit -> Product Introduction -> Feature Demonstration -> Multi-product Showcase -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main creator (Cai Aga) and 1 female co-star/assistant.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The male character wears a light blue and white denim-style shirt with dark blue jeans and white sneakers. The female character wears a black long-sleeved crop top and black pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern kitchen with white tile walls, wooden shelving, and white cabinetry. Some scenes occur in a photography studio with professional lighting and a long wooden bench.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage -> Hook -> List-based: Hook (Humorous Skit) -> Evidence (Detailed Product Demo) -> List-based (Benefit Summary) -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a direct-response commercial featuring popular Taiwanese YouTuber Cai Aga. The ultimate goal is to promote a Mother's Day sale for DIKE brand kitchen appliances (specifically the dishwasher, food waste disposer, and pressure cooker). It uses high-energy humor and a 'problem-solution' narrative (manual dishwashing vs. automated dishwasher) to encourage viewers to purchase via a group-buy link.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The characters explicitly demonstrate the product's functions, mention the brand name repeatedly, and provide specific discount information and a call to action.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Cai Aga's signature exaggerated facial expressions and fast-paced, high-volume delivery style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges entertainment and advertising by using the influencer's established comedy persona to pitch household appliances.
